name: Tata - GenAI Powered Data Analytics
description: Completed a GenAI-Powered Data Analytics job simulation by Forage, gaining hands-on experience in exploratory data analysis, risk profiling, and AI-based delinquency prediction. Developed business reports and data storytelling strategies, and designed an AI-driven collections approach for financial decision-making.

name: British Airways - Data Science
description: Completed the British Airways Data Science Job Simulation by Forage, gaining hands-on experience in web scraping, exploratory data analysis, and predictive modeling. Analyzed customer review data to extract insights and built machine learning models to predict customer buying behavior, supporting data-driven decision-making in the aviation domain.

name: Data Science & Analytics
description: Completed a Data Science & Analytics internship with Future Interns, working on real-world business datasets to perform end-to-end data analysis and visualization. The internship involved multiple project-based tasks including data cleaning, EDA, and building interactive dashboards to extract actionable insights.

name: AI Tools Workshop
description: Completed an AI Tools & ChatGPT Workshop by be10x, gaining hands-on experience in using generative AI tools to improve productivity and automate real-world tasks. Learned practical applications of AI in data analysis, content creation, coding, and presentation building.
